results.notes: All load-bearing claims verified: defaults (carbon=normal_dec17, som=cellpool_jan23, urban=exo_nov21, cropland=detail_apr24), q52/q59/q29 equations+line cites, macros.gms:18 growth macro, set cites (c_pools 324, emis_oneoff 314, emis_land 332), populator attributions, interface-var declaring modules, scalar defaults all match. Only a §8.4-vs-§5.2 internal inconsistency (44% vs 56% at yr5) in illustrative material, but code comment also says 44%, so no code contradiction.

findings.flagged_claim: pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac is 'Populated by: Module 32 (owner; modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/declarations.gms:9, set in modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/preloop.gms:71).'
findings.doc_location: Section 5.1 Multi-Module Parameters, line 295 (Carbon System bullet)
findings.bug_class: Latent doc error (wrong producer/owner attribution of a multi-module interface parameter) - rubric class 15 / R20-G2 anchor
findings.code_evidence: pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac is DECLARED (owned) SOLELY in Module 52: modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/declarations.gms:9 ' pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac(t_all,j,ac,ag_pools) Vegetation secondary forest carbon density for age classes and carbon pools (tC per ha)'. Module 32's dynamic_may24/declarations.gms:9 is the scalar ' s32_establishment_dynamic' (a forestry plantation switch), NOT this parameter; Module 32 never declares or populates it. The parameter is assigned in Module 52 only (normal_dec17/preloop.gms:71 and start.gms:28,31). So 'owner = Module 32' is wrong and self-contradicts the doc's own (correct) 'set in modules/52_carbon/.../preloop.gms:71'.
findings.verify_cmd: grep -rn 'pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac(' modules/*/*/declarations.gms | grep -v uncalib  ->  ONLY 'modules/52_carbon/normal_dec17/declarations.gms:9'. sed -n '9p' modules/32_forestry/dynamic_may24/declarations.gms (via grep -n line 9) -> ' s32_establishment_dynamic ...' (a scalar, not the param).

results.notes: All other load-bearing claims verified correct: defaults (yields/trade/forestry), every vm_ var domain+declarer, v21_trade non-default, q14 eq+citation, model block (main.gms:279), iterlim/reslim, oq52 postsolve, regions, prefix table, sm_intersolve. Sole error: M32 owner attribution for pm_carbon_density_secdforest_ac (actually M52, decl line 9).

findings.flagged_claim: Under 'Pure Sinks': '80_optimization <- vm_cost_glo (always; default nlp_apr17 minimizes only this); vm_landdiff is additionally consumed by the default nlp_apr17 realization for its cost-tied stabilization solve'. The doc attributes a vm_landdiff-minimizing stabilization solve to the DEFAULT realization nlp_apr17.
findings.bug_class: Content-level citation mismatch / wrong realization attribution (Bug class 12)
findings.code_evidence: Default optimization realization is nlp_apr17 (config/default.cfg: 'cfg$gms$optimization <- "nlp_apr17"'). modules/80_optimization/nlp_apr17/solve.gms contains ONLY 'solve magpie USING nlp MINIMIZING vm_cost_glo' (lines 34, 36, 70, 71) and zero references to vm_landdiff. The vm_landdiff stabilization solve exists only in the NON-default lp_nlp_apr17 realization: modules/80_optimization/lp_nlp_apr17/solve.gms:76 'solve magpie USING nlp MINIMIZING vm_landdiff' and :196 (same). vm_landdiff is declared in 10_land.
findings.verify_cmd: rg -c 'vm_cost_glo' modules/80_optimization/nlp_apr17/solve.gms => 8 ; rg -c 'vm_landdiff' modules/80_optimization/nlp_apr17/solve.gms => 0 (not found) ; rg -n 'vm_landdiff' modules/80_optimization/lp_nlp_apr17/solve.gms => lines 76,77,196,197 ; grep 'cfg$gms$optimization' config/default.cfg => nlp_apr17

results.notes: Doc is highly accurate: producer attributions (vm_land/10, vm_prod/17, vm_carbon_stock/56, vm_AEI/41, pm_demand_forestry/73), consumer counts (vm_land=10, vm_carbon_stock=7, pm_interest=9, yields=3), and §7.3 file:line cites all verified correct via rg (grep -r is unreliable here). One contradiction: §3.2 attributes a vm_landdiff stabilization solve to default nlp_apr17, but it lives only in non-default lp_nlp_apr17.
